mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forum_topic (title, content, user_id, category, status) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{userId}, #{category}, 'normal')
mapper.update: UPDATE forum_topic SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, category = #{category}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE forum_topic SET status = 'deleted' WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT t.*, u.username FROM forum_topic t LEFT JOIN forum_user u ON t.user_id = u.id WHERE t.id = #{id} AND t.status != 'deleted'
SELECT DISTINCT category FROM forum_topic WHERE status != 'deleted'
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM forum_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND topic_id = #{topicId}
mapper.update: UPDATE forum_topic SET reply_count = #{replyCount}, last_reply_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT f.id, f.user_id as userId, f.topic_id as topicId, t.title as topicTitle, t.content as topicContent, t.view_count as viewCount, t.reply_count as replyCount, t.favorites_count as favoritesCount, t.created_at as topicCreatedAt, f.created_at as createdAt FROM forum_favorite f INNER JOIN forum_topic t ON f.topic_id = t.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND t.status != 'deleted' ORDER BY f.created_at DESC
SELECT t.*, u.username FROM forum_topic t LEFT JOIN forum_user u ON t.user_id = u.id WHERE t.id = #{id}
